signals.headline: Register for Canada-India Critical Minerals Dialogue
signals.summary: Contact TCS India desk to register interest in the Toronto inaugural session.

signals.headline: Screen supply chain for Russian metals exposure
signals.summary: OFAC EO-14024 sectoral designation covers any entity in Russia's metals and mining sector.

signals.headline: Apply to Critical Minerals Sovereign Fund
signals.summary: NRCan's $2B fund accepts rolling applications. Fiscal year ends March 31.
